return(function(V,s,Z,I,q,S,P,j,D,W,r,a,n,i,Y,J,e,U,B,g,c,C,m,H,N)C,W,a,r,n,j,J,U,c,Y,e,m,B,g,H,D,i,N={},function(V)local p,B=1006918+(-1169293-(-162376)),V[-891875-(-891876)]while B do end,function(V,p)local s=H(p)local Z=function()return B(V,{},p,s)end return Z end,-193116-(-193116),function(V,p)local s=H(p)local Z=function(...)return B(V,{...},p,s)end return Z
